chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Constitutional Petition No.S-237 of 2025 ________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE_________ 1. For orders on office objection “A” 2. For hearing of main case. 08-09-2025 Mr. Muhammad Bachal Mangi, Advocate for the petitioners Mr. Munwar Ali Abbasi, Assistant Advocate General. -------- The statements have been filed by the official respondents, wherein they have stated that they have not committed any harassment against the petitioners and they undertake that they shall commit themselves strictly in accordance with law. The official respondents are directed to conduct themselves strictly in accordance with the law and do not cause any harassment to petitioners in any manner. The petition stands disposed of. JUDGE Asghar Altaf/P.A
